use_cases: Hero section backgrounds for creative landing pages and portfolios
Atmospheric animated backgrounds for tech and SaaS product pages
Visual impact sections for marketing websites and event promotions
Decorative animated elements for creative agency websites
Procedural animation showcases for design system documentation
ai_summary: A procedurally animated hero background featuring glowing origami cranes that fly across the screen using CSS 3D transforms and layered keyframe animations. Each of the 15 drifter elements has randomized position, rotation, scale, and animation timing to create organic, flock-like movement. The component is self-contained and generates its own animation parameters, making it suitable as a drop-in hero background for landing pages, portfolios, or creative product showcases.
